title: Supply Chain Manager - Business Post India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Business Post India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Business Post India! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Business Post India:
Business Post India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Business Post India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
